nasb.text: The soldiers took Him away into the palace (that is, the Praetorium), and they *called together the whole Roman  cohort.

esv.text: And the soldiers led him away inside the palace (that is, the governor’s headquarters), and they called together the whole battalion.

cnv.text: 士兵把耶穌帶進總督府的院子裡，召集了全隊士兵。

ccb.text: 于是，卫兵把耶稣带进总督府的院子，集合了全营的兵。

csbs.text: 士兵们把耶稣带进大院，那里就是总督府，并召集了全队士兵。
